news.title: Purdue Engineers selected for AI Fusion seed grants to help rapidly advance research
news.summary_en: Purdue Engineers are fostering interdisciplinary collaboration and innovation to advance AI applications through one-year seed grants.

news.title: I became Purdue's storyteller: Thendral Kamal (AAE '26) goes from T2M rejection to moderating history
news.summary_en: AAE senior Thendral Kamal, who graduates in May, has become something of a spokesperson for Purdue University.

news.title: NASA associate administrator visits Purdue, tours Purdue Engineering research facilities
news.summary_en: NASA Associate Administrator Amit Kshatriya visited Purdue on Tuesday (April 21) to learn more about the university's state-of-the-art research facilities that support key NASA programs.
